title: Bloodlines and Old Hatred
description: On pages 4–6, this part follows Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, King Harald as Elbaf’s history turns darker as older conflicts, powerful bloodlines, and the roots of hatred behind the present crisis come into focus.
scene: Elbaf’s history turns darker as older conflicts, powerful bloodlines, and the roots of hatred behind the present crisis come into focus.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Out of the way!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: For the last time, I was aiming at the enemy, not you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How many other pirate crews landed here, anyway?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Liar! I coulda died!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You wanna go right now or something?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Woah!! These pirates... they're so huge?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Damn you, Newgate!! You tryna get me killed?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Shiki!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: This isn't what we agreed on, Linlin!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The rocks pirates!! If we can take them down, we'll be famous!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Kaido!! a

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hang on, are these scrubs after shaky too?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Get Back to Bed, ya Small Fries!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: G’HAAH!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I could probably slip away now... but I lost the babies!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What in the world is happening on this island?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: "Who...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: KOFF!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Now this is a big catch...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I found a prime fishing spot!!

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: Bruce yourselves, ya big ole' sea kings!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's GARP!! Run!! A fight with him will drag on too long!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: We ain't gonna fight back at all?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: CAN IT!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ZEUS!! PROMETHEUS!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Yes, Mama!!

summary: This part advances Elbaf’s Violent Past through 26 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
